name: Natural Woven Bathroom Storage - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Rattan Rectangular Canister with Lid
description:
This Natural Woven Bathroom Storage from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia brings decorative and functional style to your bath space. Ideal for storing bath essentials, it feature a rectangular shape with an attached top lid for secure storage. The woven rattan construction adds natural texture and style, plus it can be spot cleaned when required.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
